channel.title: Writeup on Pwn-la-Chapelle
channel.description: Recent content in Writeup on Pwn-la-Chapelle

item.title: Writeup - Deutsche Hacking Meisterschaft 2024: Parse my Postgres
item.description: A web challenge by 0x4D5A, solved by Vincent, Sven and Trayshar Challenge Ever found an 0-day in a 20k stars GitHub project?

item.title: Writeup - Deutsche Hacking Meisterschaft 2024: Cute Big Cats
item.description: A crypto challenge by 0x4D5A and Rugo, solved by Euph0r14 and Trayshar Challenge Who doesn’t love Cute Big Cats?

item.title: Writeup - Cyber Security Rumble 2024: Conspiracy Social
item.description: A web challenge by lukas, solved by Euph0r14, Danptr, Vincent Challenge Always wanted to start your own Conspiracy but got overwhelmed managing all the secret handshakes and passwords with your fellow conspirators?

item.title: Writeup - Cyber Security Rumble 2024: MyFirstPythonSite
item.description: A web challenge by lukas2511, solved by Euph0r14, Danptr, Svido, nikgame33 Challenge I’ve heard PHP is insecure, so I started writing my first website in Python instead!

item.title: Writeup - UMDCTF 2024: TripleDES
item.description: A crypto challenge by clam, solved by Trayshar and Euph0r14 Challenge Before the Kwisatz Haderach, the Bene Gesserit used this oracle to predict the future.

item.title: Writeup - UMDCTF 2024: PaddingOracle
item.description: A crypto challenge by lily, solved by Trayshar and Euph0r14 Challenge The Baron used AES128-CBC with PKCS#7 to hide the flag.

item.title: Writeup - DamCTF 2024: Tarrible Storage
item.description: A web challenge by M1ll_0n, solved by Trayshar Challenge Move over google drive, there’s a new file storage service in town: http://tarrible-storage.
